comment: CIFAR-10 delta-based generation: improve a valid baseline via unified diff
prompt: Task: Generate a unified diff (delta) to improve the baseline CIFAR-10 model.
1. READ the baseline code structure carefully (class names, layer names, method signatures)
2. Generate a delta that MATCHES the baseline's actual structure
3. Use the EXACT variable names from the baseline
4. Use REAL line numbers and real context lines from the baseline code above
Generate exactly 3 XML tags and nothing else:
+<new line that keeps the baseline structure valid>
- Patch only the baseline Python code shown inside <nn>
- Do not patch hp.json or transform files inside the diff
- Do not include <hp>, <tr>, <nn>, JSON, or transform code inside the diff
- Keep supported_hyperparameters(), train_setup(self, prm), and learn(self, train_data) valid
- If you add self.X in forward(), you MUST add self.X in __init__()
- Keep CIFAR-10 shapes safe; prefer AdaptiveAvgPool2d((1, 1)) before the classifier when helpful
